overrides.title: Essential (primary) hypertension
overrides.rationale: Hypertension is a common chronic CCM condition.

overrides.title: Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complications
overrides.rationale: Type 2 diabetes is a chronic condition requiring longitudinal management.

overrides.title: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with hyperglycemia
overrides.rationale: Type 2 diabetes with hyperglycemia maps to the reusable diabetes condition.

overrides.title: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic chronic kidney disease
overrides.rationale: Diabetes with kidney involvement remains managed under the diabetes canonical condition.

overrides.title: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, unspecified
overrides.rationale: COPD is a chronic pulmonary condition appropriate for CCM content.

overrides.title: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with acute exacerbation
overrides.rationale: The acute exacerbation is part of an underlying chronic COPD condition.

overrides.title: Heart failure, unspecified
overrides.rationale: Heart failure is a chronic cardiovascular condition commonly managed in CCM.

overrides.title: Chronic diastolic (congestive) heart failure
overrides.rationale: Chronic heart failure maps to the heart failure canonical condition.

overrides.title: Chronic kidney disease, stage 3 unspecified
overrides.rationale: CKD is a chronic condition with ongoing monitoring needs.

overrides.title: Chronic kidney disease, stage 4 (severe)
overrides.rationale: Advanced CKD is a chronic condition with ongoing monitoring needs.

overrides.title: Hyperlipidemia, unspecified
overrides.rationale: Hyperlipidemia is a chronic cardiometabolic condition.

overrides.title: Unspecified asthma, uncomplicated
overrides.rationale: Asthma is commonly chronic and can require CCM monitoring.

overrides.title: Major depressive disorder, single episode, unspecified
overrides.rationale: Major depression can be chronic or recurrent and is appropriate for reusable CCM content.

overrides.title: Major depressive disorder, recurrent, moderate
overrides.rationale: Recurrent major depression maps to the depression canonical condition.

overrides.title: Generalized anxiety disorder
overrides.rationale: Generalized anxiety disorder can require longitudinal management.

overrides.title: Unspecified osteoarthritis, unspecified site
overrides.rationale: Osteoarthritis is a chronic musculoskeletal condition.

overrides.title: Unspecified atrial fibrillation
overrides.rationale: Atrial fibrillation is a chronic cardiovascular condition needing longitudinal management.

overrides.title: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary artery without angina pectoris
overrides.rationale: Coronary artery disease is a chronic cardiovascular condition.

overrides.title: Obesity, unspecified
overrides.rationale: Obesity is a chronic cardiometabolic condition.

overrides.title: Hypothyroidism, unspecified
overrides.rationale: Hypothyroidism is typically chronic and requires ongoing management.

overrides.title: Gastro-esophageal reflux disease without esophagitis
overrides.rationale: GERD is often chronic and can require longitudinal management.

overrides.title: Unspecified glaucoma
overrides.rationale: Glaucoma is a chronic condition requiring ongoing monitoring.

overrides.title: Unspecified macular degeneration
overrides.rationale: Macular degeneration is a chronic ophthalmic condition.

overrides.title: Dry eye syndrome of bilateral lacrimal glands
overrides.rationale: Dry eye syndrome can be chronic and monitored longitudinally.

overrides.title: Low back pain, unspecified
overrides.rationale: Low back pain in CCM populations is often chronic and maps to chronic back pain content.

overrides.title: Polyneuropathy, unspecified
overrides.rationale: Peripheral neuropathy is commonly chronic and needs ongoing management.

overrides.title: Unspecified dementia, unspecified severity, without behavioral disturbance
overrides.rationale: Dementia is a chronic condition requiring longitudinal care coordination.

overrides.title: Parkinson's disease
overrides.rationale: Parkinson disease is a chronic neurologic condition.

overrides.title: Parkinson's disease without dyskinesia, without mention of fluctuations
overrides.rationale: Parkinson disease maps to the reusable Parkinson canonical condition.

overrides.title: Chronic migraine without aura, not intractable, without status migrainosus
overrides.rationale: Chronic migraine is a longitudinal neurologic condition.

overrides.title: Anemia, unspecified
overrides.rationale: Anemia can be chronic and require monitoring in CCM populations.

overrides.title: Age-related osteoporosis without current pathological fracture
overrides.rationale: Osteoporosis is a chronic condition requiring longitudinal risk management.

overrides.title: Other fatigue
overrides.rationale: Fatigue may reflect chronic illness or a transient symptom and needs context.

overrides.title: Dizziness and giddiness
overrides.rationale: Dizziness is a symptom whose chronic-care relevance depends on the cause.

overrides.title: Edema, unspecified
overrides.rationale: Edema may be linked to chronic disease but is not specific enough by itself.

overrides.title: Other long term (current) drug therapy
overrides.rationale: Long-term drug therapy suggests ongoing care but does not identify a condition.

overrides.title: Other abnormalities of gait and mobility
overrides.rationale: Gait abnormality may be chronic but needs diagnostic context before content generation.

overrides.title: Encounter for immunization
overrides.rationale: Immunization encounters are preventive services, not chronic condition content.

overrides.title: Encounter for general adult medical examination without abnormal findings
overrides.rationale: Routine examination codes do not represent a chronic condition.

overrides.title: Acute cough
overrides.rationale: Acute cough is an acute symptom and not CCM-specific chronic content.

overrides.title: Laceration without foreign body of right hand, initial encounter
overrides.rationale: Initial traumatic laceration encounters are overwhelmingly not CCM content.

overrides.title: Unspecified fall, initial encounter
overrides.rationale: External cause initial encounter codes do not represent chronic condition profiles.
